zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard John Lausoun於1430年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾約克時，他的父親Matthew Heslop Lausoun30歲，母親Sarah Jane25歲。他於1454年與Annabella Hind在英國英格蘭越可爾洛內達爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1494年在英國英格蘭越可爾洛內達爾享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾 韋斯特 利丁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard John Lausoun was born in 1430, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Matthew Heslop Lausoun, was 30 and his mother, Sarah Jane, was 25. He married Annabella Hind in 1454, in Lunedale, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1494, in Lunedale, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Yorkshire West Riding, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard John Lausoun est né en 1430, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Matthew Heslop Lausoun, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sarah Jane, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Annabella Hind en 1454, à Lunedale, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1494, à Lunedale, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Yorkshire West Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1454 in Lunedale, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Annabella Hind geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1494 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Lunedale, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Yorkshire West Riding, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard John Lausounが1430年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで生まれた時，父Matthew Heslop Lausounは30歳，母Sarah Janeは25歳であった。1454年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアルネダルでAnnabella Hindと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1494年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアルネダルで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア ウエスト リディングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard John Lausoun(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matthew Heslop Lausoun(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Jane(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 루네데일에서 Annabella Hind(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 루네데일에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨스트 리딩에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard John Lausoun родился в 1430 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Matthew Heslop Lausoun было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Jane, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Annabella Hind в 1454 г. в местности лунедеил, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1494 г. в местности лунедеил, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности еркшир вест ридинг, Англия, Великобритания.
